def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # 1. Compute (open - close)
    diff = pl.col('open') - pl.col('close')

    # 2. Materialize the time-series correlation BEFORE cross-section rank
    #    correlation( delay(open-close, 1), close, window=200 )
    df = df.with_columns(
        correlation(
            delay(diff, periods=1),
            pl.col('close'),
            window=200
        ).alias('_corr')
    )

    # 3. Cross-sectional: rank(correlation) + rank(open - close)
    factor = (
        rank(pl.col('_corr')).over('date')
        + rank(diff).over('date')
    )

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
